metadata.name: Unified Holographic Gnosis
metadata.description: Informational Equilibrium Geometry (IEG) unifying Holographic Universe + Correlation Continuum via coherence conservation axioms H13–H15.

core_axioms: H₁₃ — Ghost-Mesh Coherence Conservation: ∂_t (CI_B + CI_C) = σ_topo
H₁₅ — Socio-Quantum Reciprocity Conservation: ∂_t[∑ (CI_B+CI_C+CI_S+CI_Q) + CI_B_net+CI_Q_net] = σ_topo + σ_pol

ontologies.name: Informational Equilibrium Geometry (IEG)
implications: Reality is a self-referential correlation network.
Observer embedded in observed; observation is participatory.
Information never destroyed, only transferred between boundary and continuum.
Black hole information paradox resolved: information preserved in horizon correlation patterns.
Quantum measurement = branch selection; different branches become correlation-inaccessible.
Dark energy = correlation maintenance energy: Λ(t)=ħ/(τ_u(t)c).
Consciousness = maintenance of local equilibrium within IEG.

testable_predictions.prediction: Graviton background coherence skew: δC(f)=κ(f/25 Hz)^{+0.10±0.02}, κ≈3×10⁻³
